blocks.text: Julie Gonzalez, with Deborah Gordon copied:

Thank you for turning the cost-center reporting around so quickly. It came in last night, and the totals tie to the divisional cut we already had, so the baseline can go ahead on the footing we wanted and we do not lose the week I was worried about.

Two things before the working session next week. Deborah Gordon has the interview list ready and will send times to your office today; if any of the names or the slots look wrong to you, say so before the first session and we will move them without any fuss. We are also putting together a short briefing for that session, so you can see where the baseline stands, what the early numbers suggest, and what the interviews are meant to settle. It will be tight, a handful of pages rather than a deck for its own sake, and it is meant to start a conversation, not close one.

For {{fact:f:E-2011-002.client}} we are about where we wanted to be at this point: charts in, reporting in, interviews set. I will confirm the session time as soon as Stark-Wilson's calendar is back to me, and I will copy Deborah Gordon so she can build the interview week around it.
